caption: The video depicts a medical meeting or consultation taking place in a conference room. Two silhouetted figures, labeled as Forrest Wallace and Rita Sharma, stand on either side of the frame. Forrest Wallace is described as a 68-year-old male who has undergone sigmoid colectomy and loop ileostomy, while Rita Sharma is a 30-year-old female with cholecystitis, indicated as g1p0, 38+0 weeks pregnant. In the center, three individuals wearing medical scrubs and masks are seated around a table, engaged in discussion. The setting suggests a multidisciplinary team review, possibly discussing patient cases and treatment plans. The atmosphere appears professional and focused, with the team members actively participating in the conversation.
